name: gFloorz - Key Schedule Remapping
description: Updates and remaps Revit key schedule values using an Excel source of truth. Reads a structured Excel file containing the desired key schedule data and applies the correct values to elements in the model, ensuring consistency with external standards.
author: your name
inputs: Excel file with correct key schedule values
Target elements associated with key schedule
Parameter mapping between Excel columns and Revit fields
outputs: Updated key schedule values in Revit
Elements reassigned or updated based on Excel data
Standardized parameter values aligned with source data
how_to_use: Prepare the Excel file with the correct key schedule values and matching identifiers
Open the Revit model containing the key schedule
Select or input the Excel file path
Map Excel columns to corresponding key schedule parameters
Verify that key schedule values and associated elements are updated correctly
notes: This script assumes a consistent mapping structure between Excel and Revit key schedule fields. Unique identifiers (such as key names or IDs) must match between the model and Excel. Incorrect mappings may overwrite data unintentionally—use with caution and test on a sample model first.
